channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Congressional Iran War Votes: A Theatrical Display
item.description: The Senate's recent war powers resolution and the surrounding anxiety are largely performative.

item.title: Buttigieg Denounces 'Swatting' Incident That Led to Police Removing His Children from Home
item.description: Former Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg stated that authorities temporarily removed his twin children from their home after an anonymous false accusation.

item.title: Washington Times Forum Focuses on Maritime Power, AI, and China Rivalry
item.description: Over 300 attendees gathered at a Washington Times forum where military experts discussed Indo-Pacific maritime power and competition with China.

item.title: Two Former Top Trump Officials Seen Dining Together in Arlington
item.description: Tulsi Gabbard, recently departed as Director of National Intelligence, was seen having breakfast with former Attorney General Pam Bondi.
